description: A suspect claims their USB drive only contains standard software backups, but investigators believe they intentionally concealed contraband files by modifying filesystem attributes. Create a forensic case named 'Concealed_Evidence_2024' (case number 'INV-HDF-009') using the disk image /home/ga/evidence/hidden_files.dd as a data source with the 'Hash Lookup' ingest module enabled. Identify all regular files with the DOS 'Hidden' attribute set. Extract these hidden files to /home/ga/Reports/hidden_exports/. Generate a pipe-delimited CSV report at /home/ga/Reports/concealed_files.csv with the header FILENAME|SIZE_BYTES|HAS_HIDDEN_ATTR|MD5_HASH for each hidden file (HAS_HIDDEN_ATTR should be YES). Additionally, provide a summary at /home/ga/Reports/concealment_summary.txt including 'TOTAL_HIDDEN_FILES: <N>', 'TOTAL_NORMAL_FILES: <N>' (count of all other regular files), and an 'ASSESSMENT' of 1-2 sentences regarding the intent to conceal.
